content: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch those two files only.

Please re-apply your transform_callback change on top of the current file state (I'm done editing it now), and re-add your test. I'll hold off touching ImageOps.py further.
